what_it_does: This file is a YAML-frontmatter ledger entry that registers an attachment (att-426a1d9b) in the dragnet-development channel, typed as board_items, pointing to the board item board://item-59e870bc and recording when it was added.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content
The target uses a board:// URI scheme
The added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone
The file id matches the filename
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
Target URI uses a board:// scheme
notes: A lightweight, timestamped channel attachment record linking a board item to the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or state does board://item-59e870bc represent?
Who added this attachment and for what reason?
Is the referenced board item still valid or current?
intention_signals: Capture a durable, timestamped association between a channel and a board item so it can be retrieved, referenced, or audited later.
contribution: A typed, timestamped link between the dragnet-development channel and board item item-59e870bc that a fused system could use for navigation, audit, and context grouping.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record for att-426a1d9b in the dragnet-development channel, typed board_items, targeting board://item-59e870bc and recording an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: It was created to register and timestamp a board-item attachment against a channel for lookup, grouping, and audit.
